diff --git a/src/htlc.go b/src/htlc.go
index 1234567..89abcde 100644
--- a/src/htlc.go
+++ b/src/htlc.go
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ import (
 )

 func Settle(h *HTLC) error {
+    if h == nil {
+        return ErrNil
+    }
     return h.commit()
 }
diff --git a/src/htlc_test.go b/src/htlc_test.go
index abcdef0..1234567 100644
--- a/src/htlc_test.go
+++ b/src/htlc_test.go
@@ -1,3 +1,16 @@
 package channel

+func TestSettleNil(t *testing.T) {
+    err := Settle(nil)
+    if err != ErrNil {
+        t.Fatalf("expected ErrNil, got %v", err)
+    }
+}
